title: Build & Ship
subtitle: From half-finished repo to live artifact in the wild.
description: The Vector-Equilibrium vertex where builders learn the last mile: activate the venv, theme the PDF, wire the email, push the repo. Every Quest in this track ends with a 'Ship Your Own' module — you forge a personal permalink quest from your own repo.
pedagogy: Real artifacts only. No synthetic examples. Every module excerpts a file from a shipped repo and links to the original commit.
outcomes: Diagnose and fix broken CLI shebangs with virtual environments
Build dual-theme stylesheets from a single set of CSS custom properties
Ship transactional email through Resend without burning a weekend on SMTP
Run a learner repo through the codebase-to-course pipeline and receive a permalink quest
